summary: Analysis of 22 leads captured through the BEGA AI Product Advisor reveals a strong pipeline of specification-ready buyers — 59% demonstrate high buying intent through project-specific queries. PRODUCT signals emerge as the strongest lead conversion driver, with the highest-scoring segment contributing a disproportionate share of qualified leads. The 12.6% conversion rate demonstrates the AI advisor's effectiveness. The priority focus should shift to lead quality improvement and deeper specification engagement to maximise revenue from current volumes.

cards.title: Facade & Architectural Lighting conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 32% of submitted leads include facade & architectural lighting in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 7 of 22 leads (32%) originated from facade & architectural lighting discussions. Users discussing facade & architectural lighting are 6.1× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Create a Facade Lighting Design Guide with product recommendations mapped to surface types and architectural goals.
cards.impact: Facade projects attract architect-grade specifications with premium lighting budgets and high creative ambition.

cards.title: Urban & Public Spaces conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 14% of submitted leads include urban & public spaces in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 3 of 22 leads (14%) originated from urban & public spaces discussions. Users discussing urban & public spaces are 6.5× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Create a Smart City & Urban Furniture experience combining BEGA luminaires with street furniture and controls solutions.
cards.impact: Urban tenders represent large contract values. A dedicated experience positions BEGA as the specialist choice for public infrastructure.

cards.title: 12.6% conversion rate validates the AI advisor's lead generation effectiveness
cards.summary: Converting 12.6% of conversations to leads outperforms typical B2B benchmarks. The AI advisor is effectively identifying and capturing high-intent visitors.
cards.evidence: 22 leads from 175 sessions (12.6%). B2B benchmark: 10–15%. Connect with BEGA prompt appears well-positioned in conversation flow.
cards.action: Maintain current flow. A/B test showing the Connect with BEGA option one interaction earlier to explore further headroom.
cards.impact: Sustaining this performance while growing session volume is the primary lead generation lever.

cards.title: Technical Specification Intent conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 64% of submitted leads include technical specification intent in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 14 of 22 leads (64%) originated from technical specification intent discussions. Users discussing technical specification intent are 2.9× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Ensure every technical recommendation generates a downloadable spec sheet and a BOM export option.
cards.impact: Specification-stage visitors are closest to procurement. Reducing friction at this stage accelerates conversion significantly.

cards.title: Landscape & Garden Design conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 59% of submitted leads include landscape & garden design in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 13 of 22 leads (59%) originated from landscape & garden design discussions. Users discussing landscape & garden design are 2.1× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Introduce an area-based Landscape Lighting Planner linking spaces to recommended luminaire families.
cards.impact: Landscape architects are strong specifiers of premium outdoor products with high project repeatability and referral networks.

cards.title: Budget & Pricing Inquiries conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 18% of submitted leads include budget & pricing inquiries in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 4 of 22 leads (18%) originated from budget & pricing inquiries discussions. Users discussing budget & pricing inquiries are 4.4× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Introduce indicative pricing displays within the AI advisor and offer BOM generation for budget planning sessions.
cards.impact: Price-inquiring visitors have active procurement intent. Budget transparency converts this audience at significantly higher rates.

cards.title: 59% of leads show strong buying intent
cards.summary: The AI advisor is attracting specification-ready prospects. 13 of 22 leads score above 75, indicating project-ready buyers with clear requirements.
cards.evidence: Average lead quality score: 64/99. 13 leads (59%) score ≥ 75, signalling project names, budgets, or specific product specifications — your warmest prospects.
cards.action: Prioritise outreach to leads scoring above 75. Their queries contain specific project context that enables high-conversion personalised engagement.
cards.impact: Focused follow-up on high-intent leads typically reduces sales cycle length and increases specification close rates.

cards.title: Bollard & Post Luminaires conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 55% of submitted leads include bollard & post luminaires in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 12 of 22 leads (55%) originated from bollard & post luminaires discussions. Users discussing bollard & post luminaires are 1.5× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Feature bollard and post solutions prominently in guided journeys and pathway recommendation flows.
cards.impact: Bollard specifiers show consistent conversion patterns — targeted featuring would grow this high-value lead segment.

cards.title: In-Grade & Ground Luminaires conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 27% of submitted leads include in-grade & ground luminaires in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 6 of 22 leads (27%) originated from in-grade & ground luminaires discussions. Users discussing in-grade & ground luminaires are 2.6× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Add technical installation guidance for in-grade luminaires to improve specification confidence and reduce hesitation.
cards.impact: In-grade products command premium pricing. Lead capture from this segment has high order-value potential per project.

cards.title: DALI & Controls Systems conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 32% of submitted leads include dali & controls systems in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 7 of 22 leads (32%) originated from dali & controls systems discussions. Users discussing dali & controls systems are 1.7× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Add a Controls & DALI advisor section that maps user requirements to BEGA-compatible system products.
cards.impact: Controls-focused specifiers typically represent complete-system projects with higher total order values.

cards.title: Residential Villa Projects conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 27% of submitted leads include residential villa projects in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 6 of 22 leads (27%) originated from residential villa projects discussions. Users discussing residential villa projects are 1.6× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Develop a Premium Residential Lighting journey tailored to high-net-worth homeowners and landscape architects.
cards.impact: High-end residential projects generate premium-priced specifications with strong repeat potential and referral value.

cards.title: Campus & Institutional Spaces conversations generate above-average lead conversion
cards.summary: 18% of submitted leads include campus & institutional spaces in their query, reflecting strong specification intent from this segment.
cards.evidence: 4 of 22 leads (18%) originated from campus & institutional spaces discussions. Users discussing campus & institutional spaces are 1.7× more likely to submit a lead than average.
cards.action: Expand campus-specific compliance guidance and product groupings. Add IP rating and durability filters to this pathway.
cards.impact: Institutional projects are large-volume with long-term supply relationships — worth dedicated sales engagement strategy.
